projectDescription: An open-source, pocket-sized gaming console built on the ESP32-C3 with a 1.3" OLED display, running Snake, Pong, Dodge, and a DOOM-style micro FPS.
keyFeatures: Single analog 5-key button module for input
Five built-in games: Snake, Pong, Dodge, Mini DOOM FPS, Battleship
DOOM-style raycasting renderer on minimal hardware
Clean, beginner-friendly C++ firmware using U8g2 library
Inspired by Nothing/CMF minimalist design language
publicApiSurface: readButton() — reads analog ADC input and returns Button enum (NONE, LEFT, UP, DOWN, RIGHT, RESET)
AppState enum — BOOT, MENU, SNAKE, PONG, DODGE, DOOM, BATTLESHIP
Animation::drawSnakeSegment(int x, int y, bool head)
